title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud services. By exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines, attackers can deploy malicious code, potentially leading to data breaches, service disruptions, and financial losses.
recommended_actions: Immediately review and secure CI/CD pipelines by implementing multi-factor authentication (MFA) and restricting access to critical systems.
Conduct a thorough audit of cloud infrastructure for potential vulnerabilities and apply patches or updates to mitigate risks.
Implement continuous monitoring and anomaly detection tools to identify and respond to suspicious activities in real-time.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: A security vulnerability has been detected in MoussaabBadla code-screenshot-mcp up to 0.1.0. This...
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in MoussaabBadla code-screenshot-mcp up to 0.1.0. This affects an unknown part of the component HTTP Interface. Such manipulation leads to os command injection. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary OS commands via the HTTP interface, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or system compromise.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to a patched version of MoussaabBadla code-screenshot-mcp, if available.
Implement network-level protections, such as web application firewalls (WAF), to detect and block potential exploitation attempts.
Conduct a thorough security audit of systems using the vulnerable component to identify and mitigate any signs of compromise.

description: A security flaw has been discovered in Tenda 4G03 Pro up to 1.0/1.1/04.03.01.53/192.168.0.1. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file /bin/httpd. The manipulation results in improper access controls. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5526.

description:
A weakness has been identified in Tenda 4G03 Pro 1.0/1.0re/01.bin/04.03.01.53. Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality of the file /etc/www/pem/server.key of the component ECDSA P-256 Private Key Handler. This manipulation causes use of hard-coded cryptographic key
 . It is possible to initiate the attack remotely.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5527.

title: Wikipedia 12.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers...
description: Wikipedia 12.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to crash the application by submitting oversized input through the search functionality. Attackers can paste a large buffer of repeated characters into the search bar to trigger an application crash.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25246.

title: Nodcms contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows attackers to perform...
description: Nodcms contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows attackers to perform unauthorized administrative actions by crafting malicious forms. Attackers can trick authenticated administrators into submitting requests to admin/user_manipulate and admin/settings/generall endpoints to create users or modify application settings without explicit consent.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2016-20054.

title: NICO-FTP 3.0.1.19 contains a structured exception handler buffer overflow vulnerability that...
description: NICO-FTP 3.0.1.19 contains a structured exception handler buffer overflow vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code by sending crafted FTP commands. Attackers can connect to the FTP service and send oversized data in response handlers to overwrite SEH pointers and redirect execution to injected shellcode.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25254.

title: Termite 3.4 contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the User interface language settings...
description: Termite 3.4 contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the User interface language settings field that allows local attackers to cause a denial of service by supplying an excessively long string. Attackers can paste a 2000-byte payload into the Settings User interface language field to crash the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The buffer overflow vulnerability in Termite 3.4's User interface language settings field can lead to application crashes, resulting in a denial of service. However, the attack requires local access and does not appear to allow for remote code execution, limiting its overall impact.
recommended_actions: Apply any available patches or updates from the vendor to address the vulnerability.
Restrict local access to trusted users and enforce strong access control policies.
Monitor application logs for unusual activity and educate users about the risks of inputting excessively long strings into application fields.

title: 10-Strike LANState 8.8 contains a local buffer overflow vulnerability in structured exception...
description: 10-Strike LANState 8.8 contains a local buffer overflow vulnerability in structured exception handling that allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code by crafting malicious LSM map files. Attackers can create a specially formatted LSM file with a payload in the ObjCaption parameter that overflows the buffer, overwrites the SEH chain, and executes shellcode when the file is opened in the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code, potentially leading to system compromise, unauthorized access, and data exfiltration. Exploitation could result in significant operational disruption and security breaches.
recommended_actions: Immediately update or patch the 10-Strike LANState application to the latest version if a fix is available.
Restrict access to vulnerable systems and ensure only trusted users can interact with the application.
Conduct a security audit to identify and mitigate potential exploitation vectors, including monitoring for suspicious activity.

title: FTP Voyager 16.2.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to...
description: FTP Voyager 16.2.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by injecting oversized buffer data into the site profile IP field. Attackers can create a malicious site profile containing 500 bytes of repeated characters and paste it into the IP field to trigger a buffer overflow that crashes the FTP Voyager process.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows local attackers to crash the FTP Voyager application, potentially disrupting workflows and causing temporary denial of service. However, the threat is limited to local access and does not pose a remote exploitation risk.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest version of FTP Voyager or apply any available patches addressing CVE-2018-25252.
Restrict local access to trusted users and implement strict access controls to prevent unauthorized use of the application.
Conduct regular security audits to identify and mitigate similar vulnerabilities in other software.

title: MyBB Last User's Threads in Profile Plugin 1.2 contains a persistent cross-site scripting...
description: MyBB Last User's Threads in Profile Plugin 1.2 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows attackers to inject malicious scripts by crafting thread subjects with script tags. Attackers can create threads with script payloads in the subject field that execute when users visit the attacker's profile page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25250.

title: MyBB My Arcade Plugin 1.3 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows...
description: MyBB My Arcade Plugin 1.3 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated users to inject malicious scripts through arcade game score comments. Attackers can add crafted HTML and JavaScript payloads in the comment field that execute when other users view or edit the comment.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25249.

title: Snes9K 0.0.9z contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the Netplay Socket Port Number field...
description: Snes9K 0.0.9z contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the Netplay Socket Port Number field that allows local attackers to trigger a structured exception handler (SEH) overwrite. Attackers can craft a malicious payload and paste it into the Socket Port Number field via the Netplay Options menu to achieve code execution through SEH chain exploitation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25251.

title: MyBB Downloads Plugin 2.0.3 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows...
description: MyBB Downloads Plugin 2.0.3 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows regular members to inject malicious scripts through the download title field. Attackers can submit a new download with HTML/JavaScript code in the title parameter, which executes when administrators validate the download in downloads.php.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute malicious scripts in the administrator's browser, potentially leading to session hijacking, unauthorized access, or further exploitation of the system. This could compromise the integrity of the platform and its users.
recommended_actions: Update the MyBB Downloads Plugin to the latest patched version or apply available security fixes.
Implement input validation and sanitization for user-submitted fields, especially the download title parameter.
Educate administrators to avoid interacting with suspicious or untrusted downloads until the vulnerability is resolved.

title: Microsoft 7 Tik 1.0.1.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows attackers to crash...
description: Microsoft 7 Tik 1.0.1.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows attackers to crash the application by submitting excessively long input strings to the search functionality. ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25245.

title: Microsoft One Search 1.1.0.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local...
description: Microsoft One Search 1.1.0.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by submitting excessively long input strings to the search functionality. Attackers can paste a buffer of 950 or more characters into the search bar to trigger an unhandled exception that crashes the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows local attackers to crash the Microsoft One Search application by exploiting an unhandled exception, leading to a denial of service. This could disrupt workflows and reduce productivity but does not directly compromise sensitive data or system integrity.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest patched version of Microsoft One Search if available.
Implement input validation mechanisms to prevent excessively long strings from being processed.
Restrict local access to trusted users and monitor for unusual application behavior.

title: Microsoft FastTube 1.0.1.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers...
description: Microsoft FastTube 1.0.1.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by submitting an excessively long string to the search functionality. ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25243.

Attackers can paste a buffer of 950 or more characters into the search bar and trigger a crash by initiating a search operation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2018-25244.

title: Microsoft VPN Browser+ 1.1.0.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows...
description: Microsoft VPN Browser+ 1.1.0.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to crash the application by submitting oversized input through the search functionality. Attackers can paste a large buffer of characters into the search bar to trigger an unhandled exception that terminates the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The denial of service vulnerability in Microsoft VPN Browser+ 1.1.0.0 could allow unauthenticated attackers to crash the application, potentially disrupting VPN services and causing downtime for users relying on the application for secure connectivity.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update from Microsoft to address the vulnerability (CVE-2018-25241).
Implement input validation and sanitization mechanisms to prevent oversized input from being processed by the application.
Monitor application logs for unusual activity, such as repeated oversized input attempts, and block offending IP addresses.

title: MyBB Like Plugin 3.0.0 contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows attackers to...
description: MyBB Like Plugin 3.0.0 contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows attackers to inject malicious scripts by creating posts or threads with unvalidated subject content. Attackers can craft post subjects containing script tags that execute when other users view the attacker's profile, where liked posts are displayed without sanitization.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the MyBB Like Plugin 3.0.0 allows attackers to inject malicious scripts into post subjects. This can lead to session hijacking, unauthorized actions on behalf of users, and potential data exfiltration. The vulnerability is particularly concerning for forums and communities using this plugin, as it can compromise user trust and platform security.
recommended_actions: Immediately update or patch the MyBB Like Plugin to the latest version if a fix is available.
Implement input validation and output sanitization for all user-generated content, particularly post subjects and profile displays.
Regularly monitor and audit forum activity for signs of malicious behavior or exploitation of this vulnerability.

title: NETGATE Registry Cleaner build 16.0.205 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the...
description: NETGATE Registry Cleaner build 16.0.205 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the NGRegClnSrv service that allows local attackers to escalate privileges by exploiting the service binary path. Attackers can place a malicious executable in the unquoted path and trigger service restart or system reboot to execute code with LocalSystem privileges.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The unquoted service path vulnerability in NETGATE Registry Cleaner build 16.0.205 allows local attackers to escalate privileges to LocalSystem by placing a malicious executable in the unquoted path. This could lead to full system compromise, data theft, or unauthorized system control.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest version of NETGATE Registry Cleaner, ensuring the vulnerability (CVE-2016-20057) is patched.
Audit all services on systems for unquoted service paths and correct them by enclosing paths in double quotes.
Restrict write permissions on directories in the service path to prevent unauthorized users from placing malicious executables.

title: CVE-2026-5037 - A vulnerability was determined in mxml up to 4.0.4. This issue affects the function index_sort of th
description: A vulnerability was determined in mxml up to 4.0.4. This issue affects the function index_sort of the file mxml-index.c of the component mxmlIndexNew. Executing a manipulation of the argument tempr can lead to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack is restricted to local execution. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. This patch is called 6e27354466092a1ac65601e01ce6708710bb9fa5. A patch should be applied to remediate this issue.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5037.

title: CVE-2026-5023 - A vulnerability has been found in DeDeveloper23 codebase-mcp up to 3ec749d237dd8eabbeef48657cf917275
description: A vulnerability has been found in DeDeveloper23 codebase-mcp up to 3ec749d237dd8eabbeef48657cf917275792fde6. This vulnerability affects the function getCodebase/getRemoteCodebase/saveCodebase of the file src/tools/codebase.ts of the component RepoMix Command Handler. Such manipulation leads to os command injection. The attack needs to be performed locally. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. This product implements a rolling release for ongoing delivery, which means version information for affected or updated releases is unavailable. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5023.

title: CVE-2026-2602 - The Twentig plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'featuredImage
description: The Twentig plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'featuredImageSizeWidth' parameter in versions up to, and including, 1.9.7 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-2602.

title: CVE-2026-4851 - GRID::Machine versions through 0.127 for Perl allows arbitrary code execution via unsafe deserializa
description:
GRID::Machine versions through 0.127 for Perl allows arbitrary code execution via unsafe deserialization.

GRID::Machine provides Remote Procedure Calls (RPC) over SSH for Perl. The client connects to remote hosts to execute code on them. A compromised or malicious remote host can execute arbitrary code back on the client through unsafe deserialization in the RPC protocol.

read_operation() in lib/GRID/Machine/Message.pm deserialises values from the remote side using eval()

  $arg .= '$VAR1';
  my $val = eval "no strict; $arg"; # line 40-41

$arg is raw bytes from the protocol pipe. A compromised remote host can embed arbitrary perl in the Dumper-formatted response:

  $VAR1 = do { system("..."); };

This executes on the client silently on every RPC call, as the return values remain correct.

This functionality is by design but the trust requirement for the remote host is not documented in the distribution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4851.
